strategy: Attack with Storm or Death, he takes +35% from both, and never hit into his 80% Myth resist.
He spawns his two minions on Round 2, so plan for a three-enemy fight and pack an AoE.
On Round 3 the creatures chain +35% Balanceblades down the line and the last one casts Tempest at your team, have a Storm shield up by the end of Round 2.
Stack blades and traps rounds 1 and 2, then drop one Storm or Death AoE to clear the minions and chunk him at once.
The minions are tankier than the earlier tier, so bring enough AoE damage to drop them in one hit.
cheatNotes: His minions appear on Round 2, expect a three-enemy fight and save an AoE for them.
On Round 3 the creatures pass +35% Balanceblades down the line and the last one casts Tempest at you, shield for Storm before then.
The minions are tankier here, the Ogres have 3,805 health and the Goblin 2,845, so bring enough AoE to drop them in one hit.
